original: Tired of those pesky gangs stealing your servant’s milk? Bright Water LLC’s maid outfit is just what you were looking for! Ultrathin shield generators woven into the fabric provide additional physical protection, and if everything goes wrong, its new Automilking system ensures that not a single drop of the delicious drink gets stolen: when danger is detected, it milks your servant, keeping the tasty liquid away from those evildoers.\n\nAutomilking requires lactating breasts and no worn chest-covering underwear to activate.
